name: Carob Poundcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and honey together until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (whole wheat flour, carob powder, and baking powder).
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, beating after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Note: You may substitute white flour for part of the whole wheat flour if desired.
